item.title: PASTA AL GRANCHIO 🦀One of the most surprisingly delicious mea...
item.description:
View on Instagram


PASTA AL GRANCHIO 🦀One of the most surprisingly delicious meals I’ve ever madeIngredients-Dungess Crab -Salmon Roe (optional)-Shallot-Garlic-Lemon-Parsley-Basil-Calabrian chili or chili flakes -Butter-Dry white wine-Bucatini, spaghetti, or linguini-Burrata (optional)RECIPE-Break down your crab: cutting off the sharp tips of the leps, removing the belly flap, separating the body and the top shell -Scrape out and save the tomalley (“crab mustard” -Discard mandibles and gills, remove claws -Crack the claw pieces -Boil the crab for approximately 7 minutes -Remove the crab from water, let cool -Crack open the shell and remove the crab meat, set aside-Mince shallot, garlic, and parsley-Sauté ingredients in extra virgin olive oil until translucent-Add Calabrian chili or red pepper flakes (optional) with butter-Add dry white wine, cook it down-Cook your pasta-Add al dente pasta, cooked crab, lemon juice + zest-Emulsify the ingredients with reserved pasta waterPlate and serve! Add burrata and salmon roe for extra depth #food #cibo #italian #fusion #pasta #burrata #salmon

item.title: Spicy Tuna Crispy Rice made with @chosenfoods avocado oil. One o...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Spicy Tuna Crispy Rice made with @chosenfoods avocado oil. One of my favorite dishes to order at restaurants but it’s simple to make at home! IngredientsFor the Crispy Rice2 cups sushi rice2 ½ cups water2 tbsp rice vinegar1 tbsp sugar1 tsp saltKombuChosen Foods Avocado Oil Spray (for greasing & crisping)For the Spicy Tuna Sushi-grade tuna, finely dicedChosen Foods Avocado Oil MayoSriracha (or to taste)Soy sauce1 tsp toasted sesame seeds and/or ground sesame1 tsp fresh lime (juice)Green onionGarnishesFresh avocado slicesJalapeño Sesame seeds*Cilantro would also work well here! #ChosenPartner

item.title: Beetroot Risotto with Scallops 💕 Happy Valentine’s Day! Ing...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Beetroot Risotto with Scallops 💕 Happy Valentine’s Day! Ingredients-Red beets-Shallot-Mushrooms of choice, I used an assortment!-Garlic-Sage-Thyme-Lemon-Scallops-Butter (I also used a homemade herb compound butter to baste the scallops)-Arborio or Rice-Vegetable or Chicken Stock-Extra virgin olive oil-White wine -Parmigiano Reggiano -Salt-Black pepper#valentinesday #risotto #italianfood #cooking #dinnerrecipe

item.title: Korean fried chicken sandwich 🍗🤤 Who are you rooting for i...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Korean fried chicken sandwich 🍗🤤 Who are you rooting for in the Super Bowl?IngredientsFor the chicken-Boneless, skinless chicken thighs-Buttermilk-Gochujang-Kimchi juice-Garlic powder-Onion Powder-Salt-PepperFor the breading-AP Flour-Cornstarch-Baking powder-Paprika-Garlic powder-Salt-Black pepper-Frying oil For the gochujang sauce-Gochujang-Honey-Soy sauce-Vinegar-Sesame oil-Grated garlic-Grated ginger For the slaw-Green and purple cabbage-Carrots-Rice vinegar-Sesame oil-Salt-Sesame seedsFor the Sandwich -Brioche buns-Spicy gochujang mayo -green onion#cooking #friedchicken #superbowl #sandwich #koreanfriedchicken

item.title: WIENER SCHNITZEL & ERDÄPFELSALAT (Potato salad) I had this ...
item.description:
View on Instagram


WIENER SCHNITZEL & ERDÄPFELSALAT (Potato salad) I had this in Austria for the first time a week ago and it was brilliant so here we are 😊Ingredients For the Schnitzel-Veal cutlets -Salt-Freshly ground black pepper-All-purpose flour-Eggs-Fine breadcrumbs (I put mine into the blender to blitz them into the fine consistency)-Ghee / clarified butter and/or high smoke point oil Garnish: optional but traditional and great (: -Lemon slices-Anchovy fillets -CapersFor the Erdäpfelsalat (Potato Salad)-Waxy potatoes (such as Yukon gold) -Red onion-Beef broth-White vinegar-Dijon mustard-Sugar-Neutral oil (such as avocado oil, sunflower oil)-Salt-Black pepper-ChivesLingonberry Jam It can be hard to find lingonberries in the US — some specialty markets sell the jam imported from Europe! BUT if you find them and can make it fresh: -1 cup fresh or frozen lingonberries-½ cup sugar -¼ cup water-1 tsp lemon juice#cooking #wienerschnitzel #dinner #recipes

item.title: Join @anasofiafehn at 5850 Fest for a one-of-a-kind culinary exp...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Join @anasofiafehn at 5850 Fest for a one-of-a-kind culinary experience in part of our Summit to Table series! Line Up 🍽️: @tylerflorence @stephanieizard @thechefartsmith @chefkarenakunowicz Product provided by 🥩: @snakeriverfarms Secure your VIP access 🔥

item.title: Feijoada 🇧🇷 The ingredients for this dish can sometimes be...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Feijoada 🇧🇷 The ingredients for this dish can sometimes be hard to source— sharing what I used and some popular options / substitutions ☺️ Ingredients -Black beans-Garlic-Onion-Bay leaf-Pork ribs-Pork belly-Beef short ribs-Carne seca-Longuiça or calabresa sausage (linguica is most popular, I couldn’t find it so used calabresa)-Cassava flour -Bacon-CilantroFor serving-White rice-Orange slices-Collard greens-FarofaOther pork cuts such as pork feet, ears, and tail are traditionally used but are not in this recipe#cooking #feijodada #brazil

item.title: STEAK AU POIVRE WITH FRITESIngredients For the frites / french f...
item.description:
View on Instagram


STEAK AU POIVRE WITH FRITESIngredients For the frites / french fry -Russet potatoes-Frying oil (peanut oil, beef tallow, vegetable oil— many options 😁)-Salt (optional truffle salt) For the sauce-Butter-Shallot-Multicolor peppercorn-Cognac -Heavy cream-Beef stockFor the steak-Ribeye, filet mignon, NY strip -Coarse salt / kosher salt-Beef tallow (or other oil to sear) -Butter-Garlic-Rosemary-ThymeChives for garnish#cooking #steakfrites

SPAGHETTI ALLA PUTTANESCA🫒Ingredients -Garlic-Anchovy-Capers-Peperoncino-Parsley-Black and green olives (Gaeta, kalamata, castelvetrano)-Extra Virgin Olive Oil-San Marzano Whole Peeled Tomatoes -Spaghetti or Linguine#cooking #spaghetti #puttanesca #dinner
